name: Mom's Pumpkin Chiffon Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake pastry shell.
2. Soften gelatin in cold water.
3. Combine pumpkin, brown sugar, egg yolks, spices, and salt in the top of a double boiler; cook over hot, not boiling water until thickened, stirring constantly.
4. Add softened gelatin to the hot pumpkin mixture and stir until dissolved. Remove from hot water. Chill until it begins to thicken.
5. Beat egg whites until stiff but not dry; beat in granulated sugar. Fold into cooled pumpkin mixture, adding orange rind.
6. Whip cream and fold into pumpkin mixture. Pour into baked shell and chill.
7. Top with additional whipped cream.
